name: Tri Origin Minerals Ltd
description: TriAusMin Limited (formerly Tri Origin Minerals Ltd) is an Australian-based mineral exploration and development company. The company is primarily focused on the exploration and development of base and precious metals deposits, with a specific emphasis on projects located within the Lachlan Fold Belt mineral province of New South Wales, Australia. Through its exploration activities, the company seeks to identify and advance mineral resources, contributing to the broader mining sector in the region.
